name: Coast360
description_short: Coast360 Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and mortgages to its members.
description_long:
Coast360 Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union serving members with a range of financial products and services. As a not-for-profit, member-owned institution insured by the NCUA, Coast360 operates multiple physical locations and provides both in-person and online banking services. The organization maintains a commitment to member security, including phishing alerts and fraud prevention measures prominently displayed on their website.

Coast360 offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (checking, savings, term shares, Christmas Club), consumer loans (personal, auto, share-secured), credit cards with APR as low as 14.00%, mortgage financing up to 97% LTV, and specialized accounts like their College Checking with Visa debit card. They also provide youth banking programs (Kids360 and Teen360) and tools like MyCardRules for card control and management. Their personal loans start at 6.99% APR and auto loans at 5.50% APR.

Coast360 distinguishes itself through member-centric features including travel notices to prevent service disruption, youth financial education programs, and share-secured lending options that allow members to build credit while keeping savings secure. The organization emphasizes accessibility with AudioEye toolbar support and provides multiple service channels including online banking, mobile options, and physical branch locations with ATM networks.

As a credit union, Coast360 operates on a not-for-profit basis, meaning member benefits may exceed those of traditional banks. However, membership eligibility requirements and potential field-of-membership restrictions may apply. The rates shown (3.85% APY on term shares, 1.35% on Christmas Club) are current but subject to change, and actual rates depend on creditworthiness and account terms.
services: Christmas Club savings accounts (APY up to 1.35%)
College Checking with Visa debit card
Kids360 and Teen360 youth banking programs
Travel notice service for fraud prevention
pros: Personal loans available starting at 6.99% APR, competitive for credit unions
Auto loans start at 5.50% APR with flexible terms
Mortgage financing up to 97% LTV for home purchases, renovations, or building
Share-secured loans allow members to build credit while protecting savings
Youth banking programs (Kids360 and Teen360) for financial education
MyCardRules app provides comprehensive card controls including spending limits and location restrictions
Multiple physical locations and ATM network for member access
cons: Credit card APR starts at 14.00%, which is on the higher end for credit cards
Membership may be restricted by field-of-membership eligibility requirements
No same-day loan approval mentioned; processing times not specified on website
Limited emergency or small-dollar loan options visible on website
Rates shown contain asterisks suggesting restrictions or promotional terms not detailed
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto and personal loan rates with membership benefits
Families wanting to teach children financial literacy through youth banking programs
Home buyers interested in high-LTV mortgage financing options
Individuals looking to build credit through share-secured loans
diagnosis: Coast360 is best for individuals eligible for membership seeking competitive loan rates, mortgage financing, and comprehensive banking services through a not-for-profit credit union model. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted by field-of-membership requirements, and prospective members should verify membership eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
